--story-state-shadow-report
Parse StoryProject semantic state, print a read-only shadow diff, and exit without generation.
--activate-story-state
Explicitly activate calibrated strict StoryProject semantic state for this book.
--story-state-calibration-report PATH
Tamper-evident calibration report required by --activate-story-state.
--allow-story-state-shadow-downgrade
On a pinned strict profile mismatch, explicitly run in non-authoritative shadow mode; next-step readiness remains false.
